suburban_family.label: Suburban Family
suburban_family.desc: Mid-age homeowners with kids. Multi-device household, streaming + gaming heavy.

rec1.title: 1G Internet + Multi-Line Mobile
rec1.products: 1 Gig @ $70/mo (5yr lock) · Unlimited $40/line for 3-4 lines · Free line 12 months
rec1.hook: "With the kids streaming and gaming while you're working, 1 Gig keeps everyone connected without buffering. And with 3 lines at $40 each, the whole family's covered."
rec1.addons: Disney+/Hulu/Peacock included 36mo · iPhone 17e on us w/ trade-in for the kids

rec2.title: Home Security + StreamSaver
rec2.hook: "You mentioned the kids — our Home Security lets you check cameras from your phone while you're at work. And instead of paying for Netflix, Disney+, and Hulu separately, bundle them for $22."
rec2.addons: Smart Home cameras $5/mo each · XMC device protection $15/mo

affluent_pro.label: Affluent Professional
affluent_pro.desc: High-income, WFH-heavy, tech-savvy. Values premium features and convenience.

rec1.title: 1G+ Internet + Premium Unlimited
rec1.products: 1 Gig @ $70/mo or 1.2G @ $100/mo (5yr lock) · Premium Unlimited $50/line · Free line 12 months
rec1.hook: "Working from home, you need rock-solid speed that doesn't drop during video calls. Premium Unlimited gives you 100GB data, 4K streaming, and Global Travel Pass included."
rec1.addons: Up to $1,100 off Samsung · $400 off iPhone 17e · 30GB hotspot

rec2.title: Full StreamSaver + Home Security
rec2.hook: "At $30/mo for all five streaming apps, you save over 25% vs paying separately. And with the Ultimate security package, 10 sensors and 2 cameras cover the whole property."
rec2.addons: Xfinity Pro $15/mo for boosted streaming/gaming · Voice Premier $30/mo

young_urban.label: Young Urban
young_urban.desc: Young renters, smaller households, streaming-first, tech-comfortable. WFH common.

rec1.title: 1G Internet + Premium Unlimited + StreamSaver
rec1.products: 1 Gig @ $70/mo (5yr lock) · Premium Unlimited $50/line · Free line 12 months · StreamSaver $15/mo
rec1.hook: "1 Gig with a 5-year price lock — no contract, just locked pricing. And your Xfinity Mobile line is free for 12 months. Bundle your streaming for $15/mo instead of paying $45+ separately."
rec1.addons: Disney+/Hulu/Peacock included 36mo · iPhone 17e on us w/ trade-in

rec2.title: Smart Home + Device Deals
rec2.products: Smart Home $10/mo (cameras, no drilling — great for renters) · XMC $15/mo
rec2.hook: "Since you're renting, our Smart Home is wireless — no drilling, take it when you move. $10/mo for 24/7 camera recording and AI detection. And XMC covers your phone for unlimited screen repairs."

budget_family.label: Budget Family
budget_family.desc: Cost-conscious families, often renters. Lead with savings and free offers.

rec1.title: 300M Internet + Free Mobile Line
rec1.products: 300 Mbps @ $45/mo (5yr lock) · Free Unlimited line 12 months ($480 value) · No contract, no ETF
rec1.hook: "I can lock your Internet at $45/mo for 5 full years — that price never goes up. And you get a free mobile line for 12 months, that's $480 in savings right there."
rec1.addons: NOW Mobile $25/line if no credit check needed · Risk-free 30 days

rec2.title: NOW TV + Basic StreamSaver
rec2.products: NOW TV $30/mo (125+ channels, no locals) · StreamSaver $15/mo (Peacock+Disney++Hulu)
rec2.hook: "NOW TV gives the family 125+ channels for $30 — reality, cooking, kids shows, sports. And for $15/mo you get Disney+, Hulu, and Peacock instead of paying $35+ separately."
rec2.addons: NOW Internet $30/mo (100M, no credit check) if needed · Smart Home $10/mo

mature_value.label: Mature Value
mature_value.desc: Older homeowners, moderate income. Value simplicity, reliability, and keeping in touch.

rec1.title: 500M Internet + Unlimited Mobile
rec1.products: 500 Mbps @ $60/mo (5yr lock) · Unlimited $40/line · Free line 12 months
rec1.hook: "500 Mbps handles everything you need — video calls with the family, streaming your shows, browsing — and the price is locked for 5 years. Plus your mobile line is free for a full year."

rec2.title: Voice Premier + Home Security
rec2.products: Voice Premier $30/mo (APPD) — unlimited international to 90+ countries · Home Security $55/mo (APPD)
rec2.hook: "Voice Premier gives you unlimited calls to over 90 countries — perfect for staying connected with family. And Home Security lets you keep an eye on things from your phone when you're away."
rec2.addons: Xfinity TV for local news + sports · Smart Home cameras $5/mo

multicultural.label: Multicultural Family
multicultural.desc: Spanish-speaking and/or foreign-born families. Multi-generational, value connectivity.

rec1.title: 500M Internet + Multi-Line Mobile + Voice Premier
rec1.products: 500 Mbps @ $60/mo (5yr lock) · Unlimited $40/line for 3-4 lines · Free line 12mo · Voice Premier $30/mo (90+ countries)
rec1.hook: "The whole family stays connected — fast Internet for everyone at home, mobile lines for $40 each, and Voice Premier for unlimited calls to family back home in over 90 countries."
rec1.addons: Mexico/Canada included on all mobile plans · $25 activation waived

rec2.title: NOW TV Latino + StreamSaver
rec2.products: NOW TV Latino $30/mo (Spanish channels + soccer) · StreamSaver $15/mo (Disney++Hulu+Peacock)
rec2.hook: "NOW TV Latino has all the Spanish-language channels plus soccer coverage for $30/mo. Add StreamSaver for $15 and the whole family gets Disney+, Hulu, and Peacock too."
rec2.addons: Xumo Stream Box included · Smart Home $10/mo for renters
